name: CreatorIQ — O1 Product Launch Email Sequence

nodes.name: Webhook — New Product Launch
Code — Generate 5-Email Sequence
nodes.notes:
Generates full 5-email product launch sequence:
Email 1 (Day 0): Launch announcement + early bird
Email 2 (Day 2): Social proof
Email 3 (Day 6): Value deep dive
Email 4 (Day 13): Transformation stories
Email 5 (Day 29): Last chance close
Value: 10 hours saved per launch.

nodes.name: IF — Final Email? (Last Chance)
nodes.notes:
TRUE: Email 5 (Last Chance) → send with high priority flag
FALSE: Emails 1-4 → send with standard priority

nodes.name: Set — High Priority Flag
nodes.notes: Marks Email 5 (Last Chance) as URGENT with countdown timer flag.

nodes.name: Merge — All Emails
nodes.notes: Combines all 5 emails into single scheduled output.

nodes.name: HTTP Request — Schedule Email
nodes.notes:
Sends each email to your email service provider.
Replace URL with: Mailchimp, ConvertKit, ActiveCampaign webhook.
Retry 3x with 5s delay.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'SEQUENCE_SCHEDULED', campaign_id: $('Code — Generate 5-Email Sequence').first().json.campaign_id, emails_queued: 5, first_send: $('Code — Generate 5-Email Sequence').first().json.scheduled_for, last_send: $('Code — Generate 5-Email Sequence').last().json.scheduled_for, workflow: 'O1 — Product Launch Email Sequence', hours_saved: 10 }, null, 2) }}

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes:
Returns confirmation to frontend:
{ status: SEQUENCE_SCHEDULED, emails_queued: 5, hours_saved: 10 }
